name: RQ
description: Query the RQ platform by CVE identifier to retrieve affected assets and financial risk data, including CVSS/EPSS scores, exploitability status, and estimated contributory financial impact.

options.name: RQ Base URL
options.description: The base URL for your RQ instance (e.g. https://your-org.rq.example.com). Do not include a trailing slash.

options.name: Personal Access Token
options.description: Your RQ Personal Access Token used for Bearer token authentication.
